context: Location:   predominantly in uterine fundus; 24% in isthmic portion) ◊  10% cancer rate with endometrial thickness of 6-15 mm ◊  50% cancer rate with endometrial thickness of > 15 mm √  irregular heterogeneous endometrium > 5 mm in thickness √  focal / diffuse endometrial thickening (mean thickness of 18.2 mm) √  irregular poorly defined endometrial-myometrial interface √  increased echogenicity in myometrium (= invasive endometrial cancer) √  Doppler waveforms with resistive index < 0.7 suggest malignancy √  echogenic mass with irregular sonolucent areas √  mass hypo- / hyperechoic relative t
